final:
module shift_register (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input load,
  input [15:0] parallel_in,
  output reg [15:0] q);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) q <= 16'b0000000000000000;
    else if (load) q <= parallel_in;
    else q <= {1'b0, q[15:1]};
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= 16'hFFFF;
    end
  end

endmodule
